remotes.fairydreaming: fairydreaming/llama.cpp (PR #21149 source — read-only, do not push)
remotes.mine: cchuter/llama.cpp (our fork — push feature branches here)

push_policy.reason: Do not alert llama.cpp upstream maintainers until we are ready. Push feature branches to `mine` for backup/sharing only. No `gh pr create` against ggml-org/llama.cpp until explicitly enabled.

notes: This branch is fairydreaming/deepseek-dsa (PR #21149) — DeepSeek V3.2 + DSA on CPU+CUDA only.
We are adding Metal kernels for V3.2's sparse attention ops, then DeepSeek V4 (Flash) support on top.
Fork exists at cchuter/llama.cpp; orchestrator pushes feature branches there but does NOT open PRs upstream.
